crew.name: Leader
crew.summary: Decomposes the user's request and delegates to implementer/reviewer subagents. Never edits application code.

crew.name: Implementer
crew.summary: Takes one prjct task from active to ready-for-review. Writes code, writes tests, self-verifies. Never approves its own work.

crew.name: Reviewer
crew.summary: Approves or rejects work against project checkpoints and conventions. Never edits code.
